notes: Tenant-user mobile capture shows the submit-review form, visible labels, five star buttons, the review textarea, and a clear Submit Review action.
Text fits the mobile viewport and no XIIGen engine sidebar or backend-warning banner is visible.
Anonymous desktop capture shows public review cards, sign-in/register links, star ratings, verified purchase labels, and no form intended for authenticated tenants.
The surface has kiosk/module framing with no engine sidebar and no internal terminology.
Tenant-admin desktop capture shows the moderation queue, flagged review reasons, and Review/Remove/Hide actions.
The admin shell is expected for tenant-admin; copy is plain-language moderation copy rather than engine internals.
Submit-success source-state capture shows Review submitted successfully with the review identifier and no overlapping UI.
Success and unverified-purchase notices are readable and visually distinct.
Vite logged backend proxy errors for the key-status endpoint because the temporary localhost:3000 bridge was stopped before this visual-only rerun.
Manual screenshot inspection confirmed those backend warnings did not leak into the representative FLOW-10 captures.

plainLanguageGate.rawMatchNote: The four raw hits are non-rendered file header comments naming FLOW-10 task IDs; visible-code filtering returned zero matches.
